TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Ralph_Bishop, title = Ralph_Bishop, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ralph_Bishop} }

S.FORM: Ralph Bishop sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. kawas tay 1915 , ryax sa tay 1 nqu tay 10, Ralph Bishop, squliql na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 1974) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Ralph Bishop sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. kawas tay 1915 , ryax sa tay 1 nqu tay 10, Ralph Bishop, squliql na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 1974) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: ralpħ βis~ɕħop s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa. kawas~ɕ taj **** , rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj **, ralpħ βis~ɕħop, s~ɕquliql na pʔunro. (mħuqil s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
